pi_items.verified_value: T8_housing_bracket.FCStd is a real FreeCAD project file (34KB) containing a mechanical T8 lead screw housing bracket design. The file is a valid ZIP archive with internal Document.xml structure containing Part, Body, Sketches, Pad, Holes, Pocket, and PolarPattern objects. It is copied from /workspace/data/T8_housing_bracket.FCStd during environment setup.
pi_items.source: File inspection of benchmarks/cua_world/environments/freecad_envb/data/T8_housing_bracket.FCStd - verified as valid FreeCAD archive with Document.xml containing mechanical design objects

pi_items.verified_value: File path specification where the FEM-enhanced project should be saved after completing the FEM analysis setup task
pi_items.source: Task specification in task.json and export_result.sh which checks for this file path

pi_items.verified_value: Fem::FemAnalysis is a valid FreeCAD FEM object type that serves as the Analysis container in the FEM module. It is created using makeAnalysis(document, [name]) and is the primary container for FEM analysis objects.
pi_items.source: FreeCAD official source code documentation (https://github.com/FreeCAD/FreeCAD/blob/main/src/Mod/Fem/ObjectsFem.py) and FreeCAD SourceDoc API reference confirming Fem::FemAnalysis as the Analysis container type

pi_items.verified_value: Fem::ConstraintFixed is a valid FreeCAD FEM boundary condition object type. It creates a fixed constraint that locks all available degrees of freedom (6 DOFs for beam/shell elements, 3 for solid elements) on the selected geometrical entity. It is created using makeConstraintFixed(document, [name]).
pi_items.source: FreeCAD official documentation (https://github.com/FreeCAD/FreeCAD-documentation/blob/main/wiki/FEM_ConstraintFixed.md) and SourceDoc API reference (https://freecad.github.io/SourceDoc/d1/d43/classFem_1_1ConstraintFixed.html)

pi_items.verified_value: Steel is a standard material available in FreeCAD FEM workbench. Multiple steel options are provided in the standard material library including 'Steel-Generic', 'CalculiX-Steel', and 'Steel-S380MC'. The task description specifically mentions 'Steel-Generic' or similar Steel from the standard material library.
pi_items.source: FreeCAD FEM Workbench documentation and web search results confirming Steel materials in FreeCAD material library; task description in task.json explicitly mentions 'Steel-Generic'

privileged_info_summary: The task input file (T8_housing_bracket.FCStd) is a real FreeCAD mechanical CAD model (34KB) containing a T8 lead screw housing bracket design with modeling features (Sketches, Pad, Holes, Pockets, PolarPattern). The required objects (Fem::FemAnalysis and Fem::ConstraintFixed) are valid FreeCAD FEM object types from the official FreeCAD source repository. Steel is a standard material in FreeCAD's FEM workbench material library, with 'Steel-Generic' being the specific option mentioned in the task description. The input data is real (not synthetic) and sourced from FreeCAD's ecosystem. The task requires creating an FEM Analysis container and applying a Fixed boundary condition to a face of the bracket, with the result saved to T8_bracket_fem.FCStd.
